story: Matt designed Angie’s ring but mistakenly set his own diamond engraved “MATT LOVES YOU MORE!” After the reveal, he switched the stones back. Months later, before moving to New York, he handed the engraved diamond to his cousin Benny for safekeeping and told Angie and Randy to use Benny for annual cleanings and prong checks. Benny’s scruples are soft; Matt bribed him to swap the stone back so Angie will secretly wear his diamond. At the airport, Matt waves goodbye. Later, the couple plans their first yearly ring check.
implausible_knowledge: Benny’s scruples are soft; Matt bribed him to swap the stone back so Angie will secretly wear his diamond.
question: When Angie schedules the first annual cleaning and prong check for her ring, what is she most likely to do?
answer_with_knowledge: Avoid Benny and use a different independent jeweler for the check.
answer_without_knowledge: Take the ring to Benny for the routine inspection and cleaning.
